label: 规则装饰物
description: 在基准网格的周围按规则摆放 1×1 装饰物，支持随机、间距随机、等距、顺序填充，以及正负偏移距离。装饰物填充值从各网格最大值+1自动分配，输出装饰物网格和名称清单。
description-en: Place 1×1 decoration stamps around the border of a base grid with configurable fill mode (random, spaced random, equidistant, sequential) and signed offset distance. Fill value is auto-assigned from max(grid)+1; outputs decoration grids and a name list.
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。方形区域外围环绕一圈均匀分布的小装饰块，内部为浅色填充区域，外圈小块为深色，主色2种。

inputs.name: baseGridList
inputs.label: 基准网格列表
inputs.description: 基准网格列表（网格数组），每个元素为一个二维整数网格，非零区域作为参考边界
inputs.description-en: List of base grids (array of 2D integer grids); non-zero cells define the reference region boundary.

inputs.name: decorationName
inputs.label: 装饰物名称
inputs.description: 装饰物的名称，用于生成输出名称清单中的条目
inputs.description-en: Name of the decoration, used as the label in the output name list.

inputs.name: count
inputs.label: 填充数量
inputs.description: 摆放装饰物的数量，超出可用位置时取全部
inputs.description-en: Number of decoration stamps to place; clamped to available border positions.

inputs.name: rotate
inputs.label: 是否旋转
inputs.description: 保留参数（1×1 装饰物旋转无效果）
inputs.description-en: Reserved parameter (has no effect for 1×1 stamps).

inputs.name: fillMode
inputs.label: 填充方式
inputs.description: random=完全随机；spaced_random=随机但保证装饰物之间至少1格间距；equidistant=按角度等距分布；sequential=从随机起点顺序等距填充
inputs.description-en: random=fully random; spaced_random=random with min 1-cell gap; equidistant=angular equidistant; sequential=sequential from random start points.

inputs.name: offset
inputs.label: 偏移距离
inputs.description: 装饰物边缘与基准网格边界的间距格数：正数=外围留空，0=紧贴边界，负数=嵌入内部
inputs.description-en: Gap in cells between the stamp edge and the base grid boundary: positive=outside gap, 0=touching boundary, negative=overlapping inside.

inputs.name: startCount
inputs.label: 起点数量
inputs.description: sequential 模式专用：随机选取的起始点数量，每个起点独立向前填充
inputs.description-en: sequential mode only: number of random starting points; each start fills forward independently.

inputs.name: itemSpacing
inputs.label: 物品间距
inputs.description: sequential 模式专用：相邻两个装饰物边缘之间的格数间距
inputs.description-en: sequential mode only: cell gap between consecutive stamp edges along the ring.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间戳

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 输出网格列表
outputs.description: 仅含装饰物的输出网格列表，与输入列表一一对应，装饰物值从各网格最大值+1起自动分配
outputs.description-en: List of output grids containing only decoration stamps; fill value is auto-assigned from max(grid)+1.

outputs.name: nameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 装饰物名称清单，格式为 [{id, name}]，包含本次分配的装饰物填充值与名称
outputs.description-en: Decoration name list in [{id, name}] format, containing the assigned fill value and decoration name.
